Issues: The artwork is complex and highly detailed, which requires a high-quality print process capable of reproducing subtle gradients and rich color depth (especially visible in the skin tones and hair). Ensure the chosen POD fulfillment method supports this level of detail.

Since the art wraps around the entire tumbler, confirm that the printing process accounts for the transition points and any mechanical parts (like the lid connection) to prevent visible seams or distortions in the artwork.
